notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Shea Langeliers. Sterlin Thompson scores. Edouard Julien to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cole Carrigg GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cole Carrigg grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to second baseman Alika Williams to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Troy Johnston out at 2nd. Cole Carrigg out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Willi Castro. Zack Gelof to 2nd.
